name: prabhdeep-tools
description: Prabhdeep Singh's personal Claude Code tools.

plugins.name: sonu
plugins.description: Prabhdeep (Sonu)'s personal Claude Code toolkit. Includes /sonu:ship — a PR babysitter that gathers Claude + every enabled AI reviewer (Copilot, CodeRabbit, Aikido, …), fixes/justifies/resolves every finding, loops until clean, then merges — autonomously and repo-agnostic — plus the code-standards, tdd, seo-standards, and content-seo skills that auto-apply Sonu's coding, test-driven development, and SEO foundations to all AI-written code and content, the /sonu:tdd command for explicit test-first sessions, and the design-tree skill + /sonu:design-tree command that make Claude design by an explicit branching tree.
